CREATE TABLE test_strings (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (2, R'Hello, World!');
INSERT INTO test_strings VALUES (5, R'あいうえお');
SELECT octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1;
SELECT octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2;
SELECT octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 3;
SELECT octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 4;
SELECT octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 5;
SELECT id, octet_length(value) AS length FROM test_strings WHERE octet_length(value) > 10;
SELECT t1.value FROM test_strings t1 JOIN test_strings t2 ON octet_length(t1.value) = octet_length(t2.value) WHERE t1.id <> t2.id;
SELECT (SELECT octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 1) + (SELECT octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE id = 2) AS total_length;
SELECT id, value, octet_length(value) FROM test_strings WHERE octet_length(value) = (SELECT MAX(octet_length(value)) FROM test_strings);
